subcodes.first_line: O ye steadfast ones in the Covenant! Your letters, laden with lamentation and grief, were received. You speak rightly, for that blessed bird [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابتان پیمان نامه های پر آه و فغان شما رسید حق با شماست زیرا آن طائره طیبه
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @eulogies; reminiscences, @consolation and comfort
